title: Coordination Claims Policy
description: Validates ao_kernel/defaults/policies/policy_coordination_claims.v1.json (and any workspace override). Policy knobs cover heartbeat cadence, expiry window, takeover grace, per-agent quota, and resource allowlist. See docs/COORDINATION.md §8 for semantics + defaults.

enabled.description: Bundled default: false (dormant). Operator opt-in required to activate coordination runtime.

heartbeat_interval_seconds.description: Recommended cadence for caller-driven claim.heartbeat() calls. Advisory — the coordination runtime does not auto-heartbeat; callers that do not meet this cadence risk expiry + takeover.

expiry_seconds.description: Window after heartbeat_at during which the claim stays live (effective_expires_at = heartbeat_at + expiry_seconds).

takeover_grace_period_seconds.description: Additional window after effective_expires_at during which the owner can still revive via heartbeat and during which a second agent's acquire attempt yields CLAIM_CONFLICT_GRACE rather than takeover.

max_claims_per_agent.description: Per-agent quota. Counts NON-EXPIRED claims only (expired but uncleaned entries in _index.v1.json are not counted). Zero disables the quota (unlimited).

claim_resource_patterns.description: Allowlist of glob patterns. resource_id must match at least one pattern to be acquirable. Default ['*'] (allow all) for the bundled dormant policy.

evidence_redaction.description: Closed-shape redaction configuration applied to claim event payloads (owner_agent_id, resource_id patterns that might encode secrets, etc). Pattern mirrors policy_worktree_profile.evidence_redaction. Plan v7 §2.5 closed-shape discipline; post-impl fix per CNS-028v2 iter-6 W5.

env_keys_matching.description: Regex patterns matched against env key names; matching values are replaced with '***REDACTED***' before the event is written. Case-insensitive; authored with (?i) as in policy_worktree_profile.

stdout_patterns.description: Regex patterns matched against stdout-like free-text fields in coordination event payloads. Overlap with policy_worktree_profile.stdout_patterns is expected — both layers redact independently.

file_content_patterns.description: Regex patterns matched against inline file-content-like payloads (rarely used for coordination events; present for shape parity).

patterns.description: Bundled-policy convenience field: a single flat list of regex patterns applied to any string value in the coordination event payload. Dormant default ships with an empty list.
